title: About Orchard
clean_text: Orchard Cooperative builds privacy-first collaboration tools for distributed teams. Founded in 2019, Orchard hosts all customer data in SOC2 certified regions and publishes a transparency report each quarter.

title: Support
clean_text: Support hours are Monday through Friday 9am to 6pm Pacific. Email support@orchard.example for billing questions. Enterprise customers receive a dedicated Slack channel with a one hour response SLA.

title: Data Handling
clean_text: Orchard encrypts data at rest with AES-256 and in transit with TLS 1.3. Customer content is never used to train third-party models. Data deletion requests are completed within thirty days.

title: FAQ
clean_text: Frequently asked questions cover billing cycles, seat transfers, export formats, and downtime notifications. Trial accounts last fourteen days and convert automatically unless cancelled from the billing portal.
